# 🐛 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Code
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## 🔬 Minimal Reproduction
If possible, provide a minimal code snippet that reproduces the issue.
```go
// paste your code here
```

## 📎 Logs & Screenshots
If applicable, add logs or screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🖥️ Environment
- GoScrapy Version: [e.g. v0.1.0]
- Go Version: [e.g. go1.22.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Ubuntu]
- Target URL/Site: [e.g. https://example.com] *(if applicable)*

## 💡 Possible Fix
_(Optional)_ If you have an idea of what might be causing the issue, mention it here.

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context about the problem goes here.
